name: kontra
description: Adds AI challengers to your chat. Take a position, they debate it, you get a crisp synthesis.
long_description: Kontra adds one or more AI debaters to your chat. You take a position, they push back, ask questions, and concede good points until the debate is settled. Then your assistant replies with a short, structured summary. Debaters, models, and the round limit are configurable and saved. Works with Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google models. You bring your own API key.

tools.name: debate_status
tools.description: Show the saved setup and which API keys are set.

tools.name: configure_debate
tools.description: Change and save the debaters and round limit.

tools.name: challenge
tools.description: Run a debate round on the host's position.

anthropic_api_key.title: Anthropic API key
anthropic_api_key.description: Used for Claude debaters (the default). Create one at console.anthropic.com. Leave blank if you only use other providers.

openai_api_key.title: OpenAI API key
openai_api_key.description: Optional. Only needed if a debater uses an OpenAI (GPT) model.

gemini_api_key.title: Google Gemini API key
gemini_api_key.description: Optional. Only needed if a debater uses a Google (Gemini) model.
